theme: Weekly market wrap — condo, HDB, rental, landed
hook: Five signals this week that most buyers quietly missed

slides.sub: One week, four markets, five data points — and one move most buyers are sleeping on.

slides.lead: Vol held up, but pricing cracks are widening across all four segments.
slides.source: URA caveats · HDB resale data · SRX · POV Guy analysis

slides.post: Softest CCR median in 11 months — RCR held flat at S$1,890 psf over same window.

slides.title: Four signals the data is flashing

items.body: CCR condo PSF slipped to ~S$2,680 — lowest median in 11 months as sellers cut ask prices.
HDB resale COV narrowed: median cash-over-valuation for 5-room flats eased to ~S$28k from S$36k in Jan.
Rental vacancy in OCR ticked up to ~7.2% — landlords holding firm are already losing 2–3 weeks of yield.

slides.source: URA · HDB · SRX · data.gov.sg · POV Guy analysis

slides.title: Segments by asking-price cut frequency

items.label: CCR Condo
items.sub: Highest share of listings with price reductions

items.label: Landed Resale
items.sub: D10/D11 bungalows sitting 60+ days before cut

items.label: OCR Condo
items.sub: New launches absorbing resale demand — cuts rising

items.label: HDB 5-Room
items.sub: COV still positive but narrowing steadily

slides.source: SRX · EdgeProp · URA · POV Guy analysis

slides.label: The real read this week
slides.punch: When sellers across CCR condo, resale landed and OCR rental all cut within the same 5-day window, that's not noise — that's a coordinated exhale. The bid-ask gap is real and it's widening.
slides.punch_bold: Buyers who read this signal early secure 3–6% better entry. Most won't.

slides.post: Volume up MoM but median transacted price growth near flat at +0.3% — demand is there, pricing power is not.
slides.source: HDB resale portal · POV Guy estimate · approx.

caption:
Five market signals this week — and sellers are blinking first across the board.

• CCR condo median PSF slipped to ~S$2,680, softest in 11 months
• HDB resale COV narrowed sharply — from S$36k to ~S$28k since January
• OCR rental vacancy at ~7.2% — landlords holding firm are bleeding yield

When CCR, landed and rental all show price cuts in the same week, that's a pattern — not a coincidence. Buyers who move with the data, not the headlines, win.
